title: Nova Clinic System
description: Full-stack clinic management platform with real-time chat, appointment scheduling, and user management. .NET 9 DDD backend + Vue 3 admin dashboard.
longDescription: A complete clinic management solution built with a Domain-Driven Design (DDD) .NET 9 backend and a Vue 3 admin frontend. Features real-time chat via SignalR, appointment management, JWT authentication, and Serilog structured logging. The frontend uses Ant Design Vue, ECharts for data visualization, and Vuetify components.
